omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
With your explicit consent, Marketspace Solutions OU may share your personal data with GN Telecom UK Limited (registered in England and Wales) for their independent marketing activities.
Legal Basis: Article 6(1)(a) GDPR - Your explicit consent for data sharing
Data Shared: - Contact information (email address, phone number) - Basic profile data (username, user preferences) - Platform usage analytics (anonymized where possible) - Communication preferences and interaction history
